description: Take casual dressing to the next level with this high ankle leather shoe from timberland. The leather lends it a natural colour finish that adds to your look an immense style quotient.UpperLeather upper for absolute comfort, durability and styleHigh ankle for enhanced style and better support to the lower legLeather overlay at the heel for added shoe structure and styleLace-up system for a snug, customised FitHaul loop for handling easeFabric footbed for sweat-free comfortMidsoleRubber midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heelAggressive lugs at the fore foot and heelShoe careUse a dry clean cloth to remove dustDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
